name: Transcribe recordings into speaker-labeled notes using Gladia and Google Drive

parameters.content:
## Transcribe recordings into speaker-labeled notes with Gladia

### How it works
1. Someone submits the form with a public recording URL and, optionally, how many speakers to expect.
2. The workflow sends the recording to Gladia and turns on speaker diarization.
3. It waits and re-checks Gladia until the transcript is ready, or stops after a set number of attempts.
4. A Code node groups the utterances by speaker into a clean transcript like "Speaker 1 [00:12]: ...".
5. The transcript is saved to Google Drive as a Markdown file and a link is posted to Slack. Errors and timeouts are reported too.

### Setup steps
- [ ] Create a Header Auth credential named Gladia with header name x-gladia-key, then select it on both Gladia HTTP nodes.
- [ ] Connect your Google Drive account and choose the folder for transcripts on Save Transcript To Drive.
- [ ] Connect Slack and pick the channel on Notify Transcript Ready and Report Transcription Failure.
- [ ] Open the form, paste a public audio or video URL, set an optional speaker count, and submit.

### Customization
Change wait seconds and max attempts in Configure Polling to tune the poll interval and timeout. Adjust the file name or transcript layout in Format Speaker Transcript.

## Collect the recording request
A form takes a public media URL and an optional speaker count, then Configure Polling sets the poll interval and timeout.

## Start and poll Gladia
Gladia is asynchronous: start the job, then wait and re-check until the status is done, error, or the attempt limit is reached. Both HTTP nodes continue on error so a failure is routed, not swallowed.

## Format and save the transcript
Group the utterances by speaker into a readable Markdown transcript, save it to Google Drive, and post the link to Slack.

## Handle failures
Any API error or a timeout posts a clear reason to Slack so a run never fails silently.

parameters.formDescription: Paste a public link to an audio or video recording. Gladia will transcribe it and label who spoke.

values.placeholder: Optional hint, leave blank to auto-detect

options.formSubmittedText: Thanks. Your recording is being transcribed. The speaker-labeled transcript will be saved to Google Drive and a link posted to Slack when it is ready.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ audio_url: $('Receive Recording Request').first().json['Media URL'], diarization: true, ...(Number($('Receive Recording Request').first().json['Number of speakers']) > 0 ? { diarization_config: { number_of_speakers: Number($('Receive Recording Request').first().json['Number of speakers']) } } : {}) }) }}

parameters.text:
=:warning: Transcription failed for {{ $('Receive Recording Request').first().json['Media URL'] }}
Reason: {{ $json.error?.message || ($json.status ? ('Gladia status ' + $json.status + ' (timed out or errored)') : 'API request failed') }}
